name: lmstudio-for-copilot
description: VS Code extension providing inline code completion powered by LM Studio models with automatic discovery

lmStudioCopilot.serverHost.description: Hostname or IP address of the LM Studio HTTP server

lmStudioCopilot.serverPort.description: Port number for LM Studio HTTP server

lmStudioCopilot.requestTimeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for requests to the LM Studio server (default 24h). Has no effect when lmStudioCopilot.disableAllTimeouts is true.

lmStudioCopilot.disableAllTimeouts.description: Disable all request timeouts. Recommended for local models which may be slow on large tasks.

lmStudioCopilot.toolGuidanceEnabled.description: Enable system prompt guidance to encourage use of native file-writing tools (create_file, replace_string_in_file) for proper VS Code diff tracking

lmStudioCopilot.nativeToolIntegration.description: Route tool calls through VS Code's filesystem API for proper diff tracking (currently experimental)

lmStudioCopilot.showReasoningContent.description: Show reasoning/thinking tokens from models that emit them (e.g., DeepSeek-R1, QwQ). These appear as plain text before the main response.

lmStudioCopilot.refreshCooldownMs.description: Minimum time in milliseconds between manual model refreshes to prevent rapid successive API calls

lmStudioCopilot.discoveryMaxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for discovery queries with exponential backoff on failure

lmStudioCopilot.discoveryBaseRetryDelayM.description: Base delay in milliseconds for exponential backoff retry logic during discovery (doubles with each attempt)

lmStudioCopilot.truncation.conservativeB.description: Safety buffer percentage for conservative strategy. Target context usage: 85%.

lmStudioCopilot.truncation.aggressiveBuf.description: Safety buffer percentage for aggressive strategy. Target context usage: 65%.

lmStudioCopilot.modelTruncationStrategie.description: Map of model IDs to truncation strategies ('conservative' or 'aggressive'). Use '*' for default.

lmStudioCopilot.modelFamilyOverrides.description: Manual overrides for model family classification (e.g. { 'my-model': 'llama' }).

lmStudioCopilot.enableContextPrioritizat.description: Automatically include relevant workspace files in the prompt context sent to LM Studio. Disable to turn off context injection entirely.

lmStudioCopilot.contextTokenBudget.description: Maximum number of tokens to spend on injected workspace context per request.

lmStudioCopilot.temperature.description: Global default temperature for LM Studio requests

lmStudioCopilot.modelTemperatures.description: Per-model temperature overrides. Keys are model IDs, values are numbers (0.0-2.0).

lmStudioCopilot.loopDetection.enabled.description: Enable detection of repetitive tool-call loops to prevent runaway token usage.

lmStudioCopilot.loopDetection.consecutiv.description: Number of consecutive identical tool calls required to trigger loop detection and halt execution.
